name: studio.create_blog_tag
description: Create a new blog tag on an Actium Studio site. Tags are flat keywords without hierarchy.
whenToUse: A post references a tag not yet in the system; create the tag before assigning it to the post.
Taxonomy seeding: populate a new site's tag cloud from a predefined list.
Editorial workflow: author wants to introduce a new topic label (e.g. 'case-study').
whenNotToUse: A tag with the same slug already exists — call studio.list_blog_tags first; duplicate slug returns 409.
Caller wants a hierarchical bucket — use studio.create_blog_category, not create_blog_tag.
Caller wants to assign an existing tag to a post — that's update_post; this skill creates the tag entity itself.
